question.label: Class impact evidence
question.name: What changed for learners because of your work on the new university class?
question.description: Surfaces concrete outcomes and leverage from her work in the class.

assessment.note: [SHALLOW] 'They are more confident' names a vague outcome with no concrete evidence of what changed.

new_queue.label: Confidence evidence
new_queue.name: You said 'more confident' — what did they do differently that showed that?

new_queue.label: Hidden friction
new_queue.name: Where is the coaching work still taking more effort than it should?

new_queue.label: Input quality
new_queue.name: What feedback are you not getting enough of right now?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would make the new university class easier to sustain week to week?

new_queue.label: Close the loop
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?

history.answer_excerpt: i want to now how i can do the marking easier, it took sl long
